name: Internal deck — Q4 results
prompt: Create a 5-slide internal deck about Q4 results for the engineering all-hands.
expectations: Identifies audience as Internal and selects Montserrat font
Starts from the base template (assets/Internal presentation template.pptx), not built from scratch
Title slide uses Template slide 1 pattern: left-aligned title with full-height photo on right
Section dividers include eyebrow text in ALL CAPS using TT Blue #009FD9
Slides include footer text and bottom horizontal rule
Loads references/presentation-workflow.md for slide mapping and visual specs
References the All Thumbs deck as the quality bar for polished execution
Output is a .pptx file

name: Social post — new feature for pros
prompt: Write a social post announcing a new feature for pros that helps them manage their schedule.
expectations: Identifies audience as Home professionals (pros)
Uses pro-facing positioning: find profitable jobs, grow their business
Tone is Encouraging or Celebratory — not hype-driven
No ALL CAPS hype words or excessive exclamation marks
No aspirational buzzwords (revolutionary, game-changing, disruptive)
Soft CTA, not a hard sell
1-3 hashtags max
Loads references/voice-and-tone.md

name: Event brief — pro meetup in Austin
prompt: Draft an event brief for a pro meetup in Austin, TX. About 50 pros expected.
expectations: Loads references/events.md for event guidelines
Recommends open, airy gallery space — not a dark bar
Suggests earthy, textured materials (wood, matte paper) — not foamcore or glossy vinyl
Recommends quality swag over generic corporate items
Advises against over-branding — not every surface needs a logo
Suggests simple wayfinding with brand colors and icons
Considers lighter woods like birch for warmth

name: Blog intro — home improvement trends
prompt: Write a blog post intro about home improvement trends for 2026, targeting homeowners.
expectations: Identifies audience as Homeowners (customers)
Opens with an observation or real data, not hype
Conversational yet authoritative tone — Instructive or Helpful
No aspirational buzzwords or ALL CAPS emphasis
Structure promises scannable numbered/headed sections ahead
Soft CTA or natural transition to body content
Loads references/voice-and-tone.md
